message:
feat(tick-strategy): complete predictive screen tick management framework

Implements the full Predictive Screen Tick Management system (bd-1nl75):

- Custom closure-based tick strategy (C.6)
- TransitionHistory ring buffer for ordered sequences (A.3)
- Temporal decay with configurable interval/factor (B.4)
- Periodic auto-save with persistence_path and save_if_dirty (E.3)
- Load persisted transitions on startup with load-decay (E.2)
- Structured tracing throughout (H.1): INFO for init/transitions,
  DEBUG for cache refreshes, TRACE for per-frame decisions
- Debug stats surface with tick_strategy_stats() query (H.2)
- Criterion benchmark with IO reduction report (G.2)
- 13 property-based invariant tests (I.8)
- 11 integration lifecycle tests (I.6)
- Cross-strategy unit tests: Send bounds, boxable, lifecycle (I.4)

Closes tracks A, B, C, D, E, G. Remaining: H.3, F-track, I.7
(all mcp-agent-mail-rust specific, not in this workspace).

163 tick_strategy tests pass, 2021 total ftui-runtime tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+
